/home/tathuan/.espressif/tools/riscv32-esp-elf/esp-15.2.0_20251204/riscv32-esp-elf/bin/riscv32-esp-elf-gcc @"/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/bootloader/toolchain/cflags" @"/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/bootloader/toolchain/ldflags" -Wl,--cref -Wl,--defsym=IDF_TARGET_ESP32C3=0 -Wl,--Map=/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/bootloader/bootloader.map -Wl,--no-warn-rwx-segments -Wl,--orphan-handling=error -fno-lto -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--warn-common -T esp32c3.rom.ld -T esp32c3.rom.api.ld -T esp32c3.rom.bt_funcs.ld -T esp32c3.rom.libgcc.ld -T esp32c3.rom.version.ld -T esp32c3.rom.libc.ld -T esp32c3.rom.libc-suboptimal_for_misaligned_mem.ld -T rom.api.ld -T esp32c3.peripherals.ld -T bootloader.ld CMakeFiles/bootloader.elf.dir/project_elf_src_esp32c3.c.obj -o bootloader.elf   -L/home/tathuan/esp-idf/components/esp_rom/esp32c3/ld  -L/home/tathuan/esp-idf/components/riscv/ld  -L/home/tathuan/esp-idf/components/soc/esp32c3/ld  -L/home/tathuan/Project_B/usb_serial_jtag_echo/build/bootloader/ld  esp-idf/hal/libhal.a esp-idf/riscv/libriscv.a esp-idf/soc/libsoc.a esp-idf/esp_hal_gpio/libesp_hal_gpio.a esp-idf/esp_hal_usb/libesp_hal_usb.a esp-idf/esp_hal_pmu/libesp_hal_pmu.a esp-idf/esp_hal_dma/libesp_hal_dma.a
